summary: Frontend testing completed for Landing Page emotional experience updates. All 8 requested features verified working: AI-generated video testimonials (3 videos), 14 Life Pillars section, Membership tiers with correct pricing, Hero CTA external links, and Living Soul Orb rendering.

video_testimonials.details: 3 AI-generated video testimonials display correctly with play buttons
verified_elements: The Kapoor Family card with kapoor_testimonial.mp4
Play buttons visible on all cards
'Playing' badge appears when video is active

14_life_pillars.details: All 14 Life Pillars displayed with icons in grid layout

membership_pricing.details: All 3 membership tiers show correct pricing from thedoggycompany.in/membership

hero_cta_external_link.details: Hero CTA 'Discover Your Pet's Soul' links to external URL

membership_ctas_external_links.details: All membership CTAs link to external URLs with target=_blank

unlock_all_pillars_button.details: 'Unlock All Pillars' button links to membership page

living_soul_orb.details: Living Soul Orb renders correctly in hero and Mira sections
verified_elements: Floating text bubbles in Mira section

console_logs: PWA: Content is cached for offline use

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 landing page features verified working: (1) 3 AI-generated video testimonials in /videos/testimonials/ - sharma, rahul, kapoor - all accessible and play when clicked, (2) 14 Life Pillars section displays all 14 pillars with icons, (3) Membership tiers show correct pricing: Explorer (Free), Pet Pass Trial (₹499/month), Pet Pass Foundation (₹4,999/year), (4) Hero CTA links to https://thedoggycompany.in/pet-soul-onboard with target=_blank, (5) Membership CTAs link to https://thedoggycompany.in/membership with target=_blank, (6) 'Unlock All Pillars' button links to membership page, (7) Living Soul Orb renders correctly with animations, (8) No JavaScript errors on page load.
